assessed: Relevance of the quantities of interest
Relevance of the validation activities to the COU

weakeners.description: Provenance chain terminates at a node that has no upstream derivation/generation/use edge and is not marked uofa:isFoundationalEvidence=true — chain is incomplete.
Credibility factor is not assessed but model risk level exceeds 2 — unassessed factors at elevated risk weaken the credibility argument.
UofA conforms to ProfileComplete but declares no SensitivityAnalysis — a Complete profile is structurally expected to document sensitivity analysis alongside uncertainty quantification.
Uncertainty quantification is reported but no sensitivity analysis is documented — the drivers of uncertainty are uncharacterized.
Context of Use has neither an applicability constraint nor an operating envelope — the COU is declared but its boundary of validity is undocumented.
Critical and High severity weakeners coexist — compounding risk escalation.

headline: 6 weakeners fired (2 Critical, 2 High, 2 Medium); 6 factors not assessed; 7 of 13 credibility factors assessed.

context.cou_name: Morrison COU2 — VAD hemolysis credibility assessment
context.cou_description: V&V 40 credibility assessment for CFD hemolysis prediction of the FDA generic centrifugal blood pump under ventricular assist device (VAD) conditions. COU2 evaluates whether the computational model can predict absolute hemolysis levels for a Class III VAD device at Model Risk Level 5. Higher model risk drives stricter credibility requirements; Monte Carlo uncertainty quantification is performed but all credibility factor gaps remain. Full 13-factor assessment: 7 factors assessed (all with achieved levels below required levels), 6 factors not assessed (flagged as epistemic gaps at MRL 5). Decision: Not accepted.

authenticity.statement: This evidence was assessed in an unsigned demo, so identity and tamper-evidence were not verified. A formally issued assurance package would carry a content hash and a cryptographic signature, shown here for a reviewer (or a technical colleague) to re-verify.

_README: Source-grounded reviewer fixture for Morrison COU2. Firings, COU text, and structural conformance are derived deterministically from packs/vv40/examples/morrison/cou2/. Per-factor statuses are illustrative (the JSON-LD does not encode them); see fixtures/_generate.py.
